name: Ho Won Lee
title: Professor

education.thesis: Prediction of Microstructure by Multi-scale Modeling of Recrystallization based on Cellular Automata and Finite Element Method

Research Interests: Materials and Manufacturing-Specialized VLMs and AI Agents
Deep Learning for Materials Property Prediction
Synthetic Microstructure Generation using Generative AI (Diffusion Models, GANs)
Metal Forming & Additive Manufacturing Process Simulation and Optimization

Best post paper Awards, Korean Society of Technology of plasticity, 2012.5

Excellent Teaching Assistant Award, Department of Mechanical Engineering, KAIST, 2005.9
